anonymizedText:
[CANDIDATE_NAME]
Email: [EMAIL]
6+ years QA. Tools: Playwright, Postman, GitHub Actions at [COMPANY_1] and 18 months at [COMPANY_2].
Built API regression suites; no mobile or Appium experience noted.

profile.name: Senior QA — APIs
profile.description: Backend API quality, contract tests, CI gates.

response.match_summary: Strong API and Playwright alignment; mobile testing not evidenced in CV.

questions.question: Expected skills include CI/CD pipelines — your CV mentions GitHub Actions but not broader pipeline ownership. What did you automate in Actions?
questions.rationale: Profile lists CI/CD; CV only names GitHub Actions in passing.
questions.suggested_answer: Outline workflow triggers, test gates, and artifact promotion.

questions.question: You list 6+ years QA but [COMPANY_2] tenure is only 18 months — how does that reconcile with senior scope?
questions.rationale: Timeline in anonymized CV shows short recent tenure vs senior claim.
